items.title: Three Palestinian women killed as missile debris hits West Bank beauty salon
items.dek: Several other people were injured when shrapnel struck the beauty salon in Beit Awwa, in the southern West Bank.
items.body: Several other people were injured when shrapnel struck the beauty salon in Beit Awwa, in the southern West Bank.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: DR Congo and Rwanda agree to ease tensions after talks in US
items.dek: The conflict has persisted despite a peace deal signed by DR Congo and Rwanda in December.
items.body: The conflict has persisted despite a peace deal signed by DR Congo and Rwanda in December.
